creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello!

I couldn't reproduce this problem here. I suppose this is related to a 32bit build of darktable.

Could you please try to build darktable with the debugging symbols (make WITH_DEBUG=1 && make WITH_DEBUG=1 deinstall install), then run darktable from gdb791 (gdb791 /usr/local/bin/darktable)?
